central_metaphor.name: Central Metaphor
central_metaphor.description: A single, powerful image that represents the entire concept, with radial callouts.

process_flowchart.name: The Process
process_flowchart.description: A sequential flow showing transformation from State A to State B.

comparison.name: The Duality
comparison.description: A split composition comparing two opposing or alternative concepts.

anatomy_view.name: The Anatomy
anatomy_view.description: An exploded or cutaway view revealing internal components.

timeline.name: The Evolution
timeline.description: A chronological journey showing growth, history, or future projection.

listicle.name: The Stack
listicle.description: A highly organized, ranked vertical stack of distinct items.

hierarchy_pyramid.name: The Hierarchy
hierarchy_pyramid.description: Tiered levels showing foundation, support, and pinnacle.

geographical_map.name: The Landscape
geographical_map.description: Spatial distribution of concepts across a terrain or system.

data_story.name: The Dashboard
data_story.description: Quantified visualization using widgets, charts, and metrics.

roadmap.name: The Horizon
roadmap.description: Perspective view showing a journey towards a future goal.

decision_tree.name: The Network
decision_tree.description: Branching logic showing choices, consequences, and paths.

visual_resume.name: The Profile
visual_resume.description: Identity-focused layout centering on an entity or persona.

cycle.name: The Loop
cycle.description: Closed-circuit flow for repeating processes or feedback loops.

iceberg.name: The Subsurface
iceberg.description: Dual-layer view showing Visible (Surface) vs Invisible (Deep).

venn.name: The Synthesis
venn.description: Overlapping zones showing intersection and commonality.

funnel.name: The Filter
funnel.description: Visualizing reduction, selection, or narrowing down.

prism.name: The Refraction
prism.description: Transformation view: Input -> Magic Box -> Output.

galaxy.name: The Ecosystem
galaxy.description: Non-hierarchical cluster orbiting a central core.

matrix_quadrant.name: The Matrix
matrix_quadrant.description: A 2x2 grid classifying items based on two crossing axes/variables.

concentric_layers.name: The Onion
concentric_layers.description: Nested circular layers showing depth, containment, or environment.

staircase.name: The Ascent
staircase.description: Stepped elevation showing effort, difficulty, and rising status.

puzzle_integration.name: The Puzzle
puzzle_integration.description: Interlocking distinct pieces forming a unified whole.

ingredients_knolling.name: The Ingredients (Recipe)
ingredients_knolling.description: A "flat lay" or "knolling" photo arrangement of distinct components.

balance_scale.name: The Balance
balance_scale.description: A weighing scale showing the trade-off or equilibrium between two forces.

bridge_gap.name: The Bridge
bridge_gap.description: A structure connecting two separated cliffs (Current vs Future).

organic_tree.name: The Tree
organic_tree.description: Biological growth showing hidden inputs (roots) and visible outputs (fruit).

chaos_to_order.name: The Unraveling
chaos_to_order.description: Visualizing clarity: a transition from a tangled mess to structured lines.

ripple_effect.name: The Ripple
ripple_effect.description: A single event creating expanding concentric waves of consequence.

markup_breakdown.name: The Markup
markup_breakdown.description: Analytical overlay with highlights and handwritten notes on a document or UI.

team_roster.name: The Roster
team_roster.description: Uniform ID cards introducing each member of a team or squad.

scoreboard.name: The Scoreboard
scoreboard.description: Ranked rows with score bars and podium emphasis.

layered_stack_comparison.name: The Tiered Stack
layered_stack_comparison.description: Stacked tiers where each level cumulatively includes all below.

network_graph.name: The Mesh
network_graph.description: A peer web of nodes and edges with no single boss.

claim_pillars.name: The Pillars
claim_pillars.description: A central claim resting on independent, parallel columns of evidence.

glossary_grid.name: The Glossary Grid
glossary_grid.description: A uniform grid of term cards built for quick reference lookup.

analogy_bridge.name: The Analogy Bridge
analogy_bridge.description: A familiar concept mapped point-to-point onto a new, unfamiliar one.

mind_map.name: The Mind Map
mind_map.description: A central idea radiating into organic branches of related subtopics.

root_cause_fishbone.name: The Fishbone
root_cause_fishbone.description: Cause categories branching along a spine toward a central problem.

org_chart.name: The Org Chart
org_chart.description: A top-down tree of boxes and lines showing reporting structure.

swiss.name: Swiss International
swiss.description: Objective, grid-based, high contrast, and perfectly organized.

sketch.name: Da Vinci Notebook
sketch.description: Human, organic, and explanatory. Looks like a genius scientist's field notes.

mid_century.name: Mid-Century Modern
mid_century.description: Sophisticated, geometric, and warm. Jazz album covers meet furniture design.

isometric.name: Isometric 3D
isometric.description: Precise, engineered, and deep. A clean 30° perspective on complex systems.

glassmorphism.name: Glassmorphism
glassmorphism.description: Modern, translucent, and ethereal. Frosted glass layers over vibrant gradients.

blueprint.name: Technical Blueprint
blueprint.description: Analytical, structural, and detailed. White lines on a deep blue grid.

papercut.name: Paper Diorama
papercut.description: Tactile, layered, and crafty. Depth created by shadows and stacked planes.

cyberpunk.name: Cyberpunk HUD
cyberpunk.description: High contrast, neon on black, glitchy, and data-heavy.

risograph.name: Risograph Zine
risograph.description: Grainy, indie, and imperfect. Vibrant colors with print misalignment textures.

editorial.name: High-End Editorial
editorial.description: Luxurious, spacious, and typographic. Like a page from Vogue or Monocle.

comic.name: Vintage Comic
comic.description: Narrative, bold outlines, and halftone dots. Action-packed and engaging.

botanical.name: Scientific Botanical
botanical.description: Organic, detailed, and earthy. Like a 19th-century biology textbook.

collage.name: Grunge Collage
collage.description: Raw, textured, and expressive. Ripped paper, photos, and mixed media.

pixel_art.name: Retro Pixel Art
pixel_art.description: Nostalgic 8-bit aesthetic. Blocky, limited palette, and grid-aligned.

watercolor.name: Soft Watercolor
watercolor.description: Fluid, artistic, and calming. Bleeding colors and textured paper.

low_poly.name: Low Poly 3D
low_poly.description: Geometric, faceted, and digital. Like early 3D computer graphics.

art_deco.name: Art Deco Luxury
art_deco.description: Geometric elegance, gold foil, and symmetry. The Great Gatsby vibe.

claymorphism.name: Claymorphism
claymorphism.description: Soft, tactile, and friendly. 3D objects that look like plasticine or clay.

corporate_vector.name: Corporate Vector
corporate_vector.description: The friendly "startup" style. Flat colors, soft shapes, and inclusive characters.

chalkboard.name: Academic Chalkboard
chalkboard.description: The classic blackboard. Great for "from scratch" explanations and fundamental concepts.

brutalism.name: Web Brutalism
brutalism.description: The "raw" aesthetic of the modern internet. Standard fonts, high contrast, and hard edges.

acid_graphics.name: Acid Graphics (Y2K)
acid_graphics.description: Liquid chrome, distorted typography, and iridescence. A modern futuristic aesthetic.

celestial_tarot.name: Celestial Tarot
celestial_tarot.description: Fine golden lines, sacred geometry, and dark backgrounds. Great for mystical concepts.

banknote_engraving.name: Banknote Engraving
banknote_engraving.description: The style of currency engraving. Conveys extreme trust, value, and tradition.

whiteboard.name: Whiteboard Strategy
whiteboard.description: Colored markers on a whiteboard. Gives a feeling of "brainstorming" and agility.

stained_glass.name: Stained Glass
stained_glass.description: Light passing through colored glass. Solemn and suitable for revered concepts.

thermal_imaging.name: Thermal Imaging
thermal_imaging.description: Gradients of heat (infrared). Excellent for data analysis and focus.

film_noir.name: Film Noir
film_noir.description: Cinematic black and white photography with harsh shadows. For dilemmas or "investigation".

monoline.name: Monoline Vector
monoline.description: Technical minimalism. Only constant-width lines, no fills.

scandinavian.name: Scandinavian
scandinavian.description: Warm minimalism. Pastel colors, organic shapes, and lots of white space.

voxel.name: Voxel Sandbox
voxel.description: Style "Minecraft". 3D cubes, perfect grids and soft lighting.

hand_drawn_indie.name: Hand-Drawn Indie
hand_drawn_indie.description: 2D indie game style ("Hollow Knight"). Traditional animation and painted backgrounds.

1_bit.name: 1-Bit Retro
1_bit.description: Pure Black and White. Pixel art of extreme high contrast.

bauhaus.name: Bauhaus
bauhaus.description: Geometric and primary colors. Architectural and functionalist.

psychedelic.name: Psychedelic
psychedelic.description: Poster art from the 60s/70s. Liquid colors and distorted typography.

ukiyo_e.name: Ukiyo-e Woodblock
ukiyo_e.description: Traditional Japanese printmaking. Flat perspective and wood textures.

stencil.name: Street Art Stencil
stencil.description: Banksy style. Spray paint on high-contrast stencils.

manual.name: Instructional Manual
manual.description: IKEA/LEGO style. Black line on white background, isometric, no text.

oil_painting.name: Oil Painting
oil_painting.description: Visible brushstrokes, color mixing, and canvas texture. Classical lighting.

synthwave.name: Synthwave
synthwave.description: The "future of the 80s". Purple sunsets, laser grids, and chrome.

fantasy_rpg.name: Fantasy RPG UI
fantasy_rpg.description: Epic, ornate, and texture-heavy. Parchment, gold frames, and magical gems.

esports_tactical.name: Esports Tactical
esports_tactical.description: Aggressive, angular, and kinetic. The sharp aesthetic of Valorant or Overwatch.

napkin_sketch.name: The Napkin Sketch
napkin_sketch.description: Impromptu and rough. Blue ballpoint pen bleeding onto a textured paper napkin.

napkin_color.name: The Colorful Napkin
napkin_color.description: Vibrant and expressive. Colorful marker pens bleeding onto a textured paper napkin.

child_drawing.name: Crayon Masterpiece
child_drawing.description: Naive, colorful, and imaginative. Wax crayons on crinkled paper.

newspaper_strip.name: Sunday Funny Pages
newspaper_strip.description: Classic newspaper comic style. Hand-inked lines, halftone colors, and cheap paper.

calligraphy.name: Elegant Calligraphy
calligraphy.description: Sophisticated handwritten script with flowing, ornamental letterforms and elegant flourishes.

neon_signs.name: Neon Nights
neon_signs.description: Vibrant neon signs and glowing typography against dark urban backgrounds.

vintage_poster.name: Vintage Poster Art
vintage_poster.description: Classic poster design from the 1920s-1950s. Bold typography, limited color palettes, and graphic illustrations.

origami.name: Origami Paper Art
origami.description: Clean geometric forms created through paper folding. Minimalist and precise.

graffiti.name: Street Art Graffiti
graffiti.description: Bold, expressive street art with vibrant colors, wildstyle lettering, and urban energy.

minimalist_line.name: Minimalist Line Art
minimalist_line.description: Ultra-clean single-line illustrations. Maximum impact with minimal elements.

vintage_map.name: Vintage Cartography
vintage_map.description: Classic map design with ornate borders, compass roses, and illustrated landmarks.

scientific_diagram.name: Scientific Illustration
scientific_diagram.description: Precise technical diagrams with labels, cross-sections, and educational clarity.

architectural_blueprint.name: Architectural Plans
architectural_blueprint.description: Technical architectural drawings with precise measurements, annotations, and professional drafting.

vintage_label.name: Vintage Branding
vintage_label.description: Classic product labels and packaging design from the early 20th century. Ornate borders and elegant typography.
